name: Credit Professional Services - Increase Your Credit Scores
description_short: Credit Professional Services offers credit repair and dispute services targeting consumers in the Memphis area seeking to improve credit scores through error correction.
description_long: Credit Professional Services operates as a credit repair company serving the Memphis region with a focus on helping consumers address negative items and errors on their credit reports. The company maintains an online presence through their website at creditprofessionalservices.com, which includes location-specific pages for service areas. Their business model centers on the credit repair industry, where companies typically review credit reports, identify inaccuracies, and file disputes with credit bureaus and creditors on behalf of clients. The company positions itself as a solution for consumers struggling with credit score challenges who want professional assistance navigating the dispute process. However, access to their detailed service offerings and company information is currently restricted, as their website returns a 403 Forbidden error when attempting to view content. This access limitation prevents verification of specific service details, pricing structures, client testimonials, or credential information. Without accessible website content, potential clients cannot confirm whether the company holds proper licensing, maintains accreditation with consumer protection agencies, or provides transparent terms of service. The credit repair industry operates under strict regulatory frameworks including the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which mandates specific consumer protections and disclosure requirements. Any legitimate credit repair company must clearly explain that consumers have the right to dispute items themselves for free directly with credit bureaus.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.
